BookOfBelial.desc_resolved:
Use: Gain +3 Damage.
RELOAD: Kill an enemy.

MegaAlienBlaster.name: ITEM_MEGAALIENBLASTER_NAME
MegaAlienBlaster.desc_resolved:
Use: A laser attack. Gains +5 damage for the rest of the battle each time it's used.
Take 5 damage when used.

HellHook.name: ITEM_HELLHOOK_NAME
HellHook.desc_resolved: Use: Pull a unit toward you.

DemonCore.name: ITEM_DEMONCORE_NAME
DemonCore.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with Poison 5. Inflict All Stats Down 2 on bosses and minibosses at the start of the battle.
Use: A melee attack that causes a unit to die at the end of its next turn. Bosses fall asleep at the end of their next turn instead.

GoldenPickaxe.name: ITEM_GOLDENPICKAXE_NAME
GoldenPickaxe.desc_resolved:
Use: A melee attack that ignores shield.
If used on static or inanimate objects it destroys them and spawns a Coin.
Spawn a coin on a random tile at the end of each turn.

ManholeCover.name: ITEM_MANHOLECOVER_NAME
ManholeCover.desc_resolved:
Brace 2.
Use: A ranged attack with Knockback 2 that passes through units and returns to you.

TinasLarynx.name: ITEM_TINASLARYNX_NAME
TinasLarynx.desc_resolved:
Use: Inflict Fear on all enemies.
[s:.7](Usable once per battle.)[/s]

RoboticArm.name: ITEM_ROBOTICARM_NAME
RoboticArm.desc_resolved: Use: A melee attack with a chance to repeat. Gains 1 damage for the rest of the battle each time it's used.

StevensShotgun.name: ITEM_STEVENSSHOTGUN_NAME
StevensShotgun.desc_resolved: Use: Fires 5 projectiles in a cone. Using this recoils you 10 tiles backwards and Confuses you.

StevensGristle.name: ITEM_STEVENSGRISTLE_NAME
StevensGristle.desc_resolved:
Units don't leave corpses.
Use: A melee attack.
This weapon gains +1 damage and +1 use when it gets a kill.
Damage resets at the end of the adventure.

StevensBagofRocks.name: ITEM_STEVENSBAGOFROCKS_NAME
StevensBagofRocks.desc_resolved: Use: A melee attack with a chance to repeat that inflicts Bruise.

StevensBottle.name: ITEM_STEVENSBOTTLE_NAME
StevensBottle.desc_resolved: Use: A ranged attack that creates a Tar tile.

StevenWeapon1.name: ITEM_STEVENWEAPON1_NAME
StevenWeapon1.desc_resolved:
Use: A melee attack. If this hits an allied cat, spawn a quarter-sized copy of them with 25% of their stats. The copy is AI controlled.
RELOAD: An allied cat dies.

StevenWeapon2.name: ITEM_STEVENWEAPON2_NAME
StevenWeapon2.desc_resolved:
Use: A lobbed attack that inflicts Petrify.
RELOAD: Kill a rock.

ToyGun.name: ITEM_TOYGUN_NAME
ToyGun.desc_resolved: Use: A melee attack with Knockback 10 and Chain Knockback that inflicts Bruise.

Pliers.name: ITEM_PLIERS_NAME
Pliers.desc_resolved: Use: A melee attack that inflicts Weakness 3.

FeatherDarts.name: ITEM_FEATHERDARTS_NAME
FeatherDarts.desc_resolved:
Use: A ranged attack that can hit any unit in your line of sight.
Can be used 3 times per turn.

FeatheredWing.name: ITEM_FEATHEREDWING_NAME
FeatheredWing.desc_resolved: Use: A wide wind attack with Knockback 3.

MoneyBag_Small.name: ITEM_MONEYBAG_SMALL_NAME
MoneyBag_Small.desc_resolved:
Becomes {aux} coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

MoneyBag_Medium.name: ITEM_MONEYBAG_MEDIUM_NAME
MoneyBag_Medium.desc_resolved:
Becomes {aux} coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

MoneyBag_Large.name: ITEM_MONEYBAG_LARGE_NAME
MoneyBag_Large.desc_resolved:
Becomes {aux} coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

MoneyBag_Huge.name: ITEM_MONEYBAG_HUGE_NAME
MoneyBag_Huge.desc_resolved:
Becomes {aux} coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

ThePact.name: ITEM_THEPACT_NAME
ThePact.desc_resolved: Use: Permanently lose 1 [img:con] to gain +1 [img:str], +2 [img:dex] and +2 [img:spd] for the rest of the battle.

Probe.name: ITEM_PROBE_NAME
Probe.desc_resolved: Use: Inflict Charm 3. Can only hit from behind.
